description: Explicit UI contract for the Provider portal /submissions route.

header.title: Submissions
header.subtitle: Your active and historical submission requests.

no_rows.body_text: No submissions yet. Publish a resource to get started.

non_negotiables: No StatCards and no FilterBar on this page in v0.4.
Status column maps the persisted enum to a StatusPill visual: approved → verified, review → review, anything else → pending.

Persisted status enum has FIVE values (pending / review / approved / rejected / withdrawn); the visual maps to THREE — the fallback to 'pending' for rejected/withdrawn is a v0.4 limitation that production should remap when the broader StatusPill catalogue ships.
Age cell sentinel 'closed' denotes terminal submissions; production must keep the literal string.
Target cell may include a SemVer suffix separated by a single space (e.g. 'agent/curriculum-tutor v0.4.0'); render verbatim — do NOT split into two visual fields.
DataTable rows are non-interactive in v0.4 — do NOT bind onRowClick.
Sidebar badge value comes from openCount in the list endpoint, not from page row count.
